{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Sandviper Remnant
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Sandviper Remnant]] corpse was found on the stairs behind [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Sandviper Remnant]]'s stinger can be used as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
